posts.text: Original DRT3 publication: Wang et al 2026, "Coordinated synthesis of double-stranded DNA by a dual reverse transcriptase immune system"

Video about DRT3, a recently discovered bacterial defense against phages that works by churning out a massive amount of junk DNA quickly, effectively DDoS-ing the attackers.

The junk DNA is templated purely by the DRT3's protein complexes (not complementary DNA/RNA), which is very unusual.
